title: Agent Skill frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter schema for an agentskills.io SKILL.md file. Tolerant of additional properties so third-party skills don't trip validation.

name.description: Kebab-case skill identifier. Should match the containing directory's name.

description.description: When-to-use prose. This is how the agent decides whether to load the skill at activation time, so prefer concrete triggers over vague language.

allowed-tools.description: Tools this skill is allowed to invoke. Either a comma-separated string (Claude Code style) or an array of strings.

version.description: Optional semver tag for the skill.
